title: More Pet Variation!
description: [beta!!] Makes each pet animal look unique.
body:
![Mod's banner image. lots of dogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZGb0HhS1/images/79811ac5a8baeb5c3f440ddb46d5aacdb95c4632.png)
A fun (in development) mod that replaces the 9 wolf variants in vanilla with an infinite number of procedurally-generated, unique dogs to diversify your pets and make them more distinct. It currently only changes dogs, though should eventually also feature cat breeds as well.


## Genetics!
![An image showing a large dog and a small dog, and their child, a medium-sized dog with patterns inherited from both parents.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZGb0HhS1/images/6572c94802c38574e223a87f541c48290e2d1378.png)
When two dogs are bred together, their child will take traits and colours from the parents. This happens randomly, and may take more traits from one than the other. A small 'mutation' is also applied, maybe resulting in new traits and patterns.

## Puppies!
![A gif showcasing some of the changes to puppies. Namely, the inability to sit still for very long, slower movement speed and unopened eyes..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZGb0HhS1/images/8f783fb26b7f131816bbc78453ab5a5488be975a.gif)
![A single puppy sitting down. It is facing towards the camera, though its eyes are closed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZGb0HhS1/images/d419c88c8efd003724c7c951e6cc6bf75c584c84.png)

Puppies have recieved a few changes as well, as this stage is something I have always thought gets ignored. Dogs now stay as infants for ~14 in-game days, instead of the typical ~1. They also will be slow, defenseless, blind, and not able to follow their owner very well/at all.

no ai was used in the development of this mod :-)
